description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is clad in gray siding, complemented by large rectangular windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The front features a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating and potted plants, as well as a small dining area. The rear of the house includes a private patio with a hot tub, surrounded by privacy walls. The landscaping is simple, with green hedges and planters accentuating the perimeter. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing clean lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious wooden deck with outdoor seating and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, wooden deck with seating, potted plants, and a small outdoor dining area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the private patio with a hot tub, privacy walls, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Side view with fewer windows, a small covered entry, and a glimpse into the interior layout.
description_view_3: Side view featuring a green hedge-lined deck, planters, and a partial view of the flat roof and chimney.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, no steps, integrated into a wooden deck with potted plants and outdoor seating.
